labels.name: poker_table
labels.description: The entire oval/rounded poker table surface area

labels.name: seat
labels.description: Each opponent seat position around the table (one box per seat)

labels.name: hero_seat
labels.description: Our player's seat — the bottom-center position where hero sits

labels.name: dealer_button
labels.description: The small 'D' dealer chip indicator next to the current dealer's seat

labels.name: community_cards_area
labels.description: The central area on the table where community cards (flop/turn/river) are dealt

labels.name: hero_cards_area
labels.description: The area where hero's hole cards are displayed (bottom center)

labels.name: pot_area
labels.description: The region in the center of the table where the pot total is shown

labels.name: player_info_panel
labels.description: Each player's info box showing their name, avatar, and stack — one per player

labels.name: hero_card
labels.description: Each of hero's face-up hole cards (usually 2 boxes, one per card)

labels.name: board_card
labels.description: Each face-up community card on the board (3-5 cards: flop, turn, river)

labels.name: facedown_card
labels.description: Any face-down card back visible on the table (opponents' hidden cards)

labels.name: pot_amount
labels.description: The numeric text showing the total pot value (e.g., 'Pot: $12.50')

labels.name: stack_amount
labels.description: The numeric chip count shown below each player's name (e.g., '$245.00')

labels.name: bet_amount
labels.description: The numeric bet amount placed in front of a player for the current round

labels.name: blind_indicator
labels.description: The SB/BB small/big blind marker chip next to a player's seat

labels.name: opponent_card
labels.description: Face-up opponent cards visible during showdown or all-in runout

labels.name: fold_button
labels.description: The 'Fold' action button in the bottom action bar

labels.name: call_button
labels.description: The 'Call $X' action button showing the amount to call

labels.name: check_button
labels.description: The 'Check' action button (available when no bet to call)

labels.name: raise_button
labels.description: The 'Raise' action button for increasing the current bet

labels.name: bet_button
labels.description: The 'Bet' action button for making the first bet in a round

labels.name: all_in_button
labels.description: The 'All In' action button for wagering entire stack

labels.name: slider
labels.description: The bet/raise slider bar used to adjust wager amount

labels.name: quick_bet_button
labels.description: Preset bet buttons (e.g., '1/3 Pot', '1/2 Pot', 'Pot') above the slider

labels.name: confirm_button
labels.description: The green checkmark or 'Confirm' button to finalize an action

labels.name: cancel_button
labels.description: The red 'X' or 'Cancel' button to abort a pending action

labels.name: rebuy_button
labels.description: The 'Rebuy $X' button shown when hero is busted and needs to re-enter

labels.name: leave_table_button
labels.description: The 'Leave Table' button for exiting the current table

labels.name: add_table_button
labels.description: The '+' button in the top area for opening an additional table

labels.name: menu_button
labels.description: The hamburger/≡ menu icon (top-left) that opens settings

labels.name: timer
labels.description: The countdown timer bar/circle showing remaining decision time for active player

labels.name: active_turn_indicator
labels.description: The highlight/glow around the player whose turn it is to act

labels.name: waiting_label
labels.description: The 'Waiting for next hand' or similar status text between hands

labels.name: winner_banner
labels.description: The banner/animation shown over the winning player at hand conclusion

labels.name: hand_result_popup
labels.description: The popup showing hand result details (won/lost amount, winning hand)

labels.name: reconnect_popup
labels.description: The 'Reconnecting...' overlay when connection to server is lost

labels.name: buyin_popup
labels.description: The initial buy-in dialog for choosing how much to bring to the table

labels.name: lobby_button
labels.description: The 'Lobby' button for returning to the game lobby/table list

labels.name: chat_button
labels.description: The chat icon button for opening the table chat panel

labels.name: settings_button
labels.description: The gear/settings icon button for table preferences

labels.name: all_in_label
labels.description: The 'ALL IN' text overlay shown on a player who has gone all-in

labels.name: sitting_out_label
labels.description: The 'Sitting Out' text on a player who is temporarily away

labels.name: folded_label
labels.description: The 'FOLD' text or grayed-out indicator on a player who folded

labels.name: rebuy_popup
labels.description: The 'Rebuy Required' popup with countdown timer when hero is busted

labels.name: win_probability
labels.description: The percentage chance of winning shown next to each player during all-in runout (e.g., '78%')

labels.name: action_label
labels.description: Text labels like 'Call', 'Raise', 'Check' shown briefly over a player after they act

labels.name: table_name
labels.description: The table name text displayed at the top of the screen (e.g., 'Rush & Cash $0.25/$0.50')

labels.name: tournament_name
labels.description: The tournament name/title text for tournament tables

labels.name: balance_label
labels.description: The account balance text shown in the UI (total bankroll, not table stack)

labels.name: blinds_label
labels.description: The blinds level text (e.g., 'Blinds: $0.25/$0.50') shown on the table

labels.name: player_name
labels.description: Each player's username text (e.g., 'Nina U', 'Danny E') — one box per player

labels.name: hand_strength_label
labels.description: The hand strength text shown below hero's cards (e.g., 'Two Pair', 'Flush Draw')
